_meta.description: 35 legacy/migration scenarios for SIA MLM chat-engine. Mix of Hinglish + English. 17 user + 18 admin.

user.question: Mere legacy SPOT history mein total kitna income hua tha (purane system se)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum((data->>'income_amount')::numeric),0)::text from legacy_spot_history where user_id=280 and nullif(data->>'income_amount','') is not null

user.question: Old (legacy) system mein meri kitni SPOT history rows hain?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from legacy_spot_history where user_id=280

user.question: When did the migration happen and which type of data was migrated as snapshot vs not migrated?
Mera legacy spot income vs ledger spot income ka comparison batao — gap kitna hai?
Purane system mein mera SPOT income kis level se kitna mila tha (Direct vs Level 1)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select string_agg(coalesce(data->>'income_lvl','') || '=' || s::text, ',') from (select coalesce(data->>'income_lvl','') as lvl, sum((data->>'income_amount')::numeric) as s from legacy_spot_history where user_id=280 and nullif(data->>'income_amount','') is not null group by lvl) t

user.question: Mere new system ke ledger entries kab se shuru hue hain (earliest credited_at)?
user.ground_truth_sql: select min(credited_at)::text from ledger_entries where receiver_user_id=280

user.question: Mera ek purchase 2x tak pahunch gaya hai but ledger entries usse kam dikhati hain — kyu? Kya legacy income bhi count hota hai?
Mera wallet balance ledger ke total se zyada lag raha hai — kyu? Migration ke karan koi snapshot hai kya?
I think I did not receive my old direct/spot commission for some users — please check legacy data and explain.
Mera ek package expire ho gaya — par maine ledger mein 2x tak income nahi dekha. Kya ye legacy income ki wajah se hai?
I feel my package expired wrongly — only the new ledger shows the income. Can you reconstruct the total income using legacy + new system?
Mere account mein activity bahut kam dikh rahi hai. Kya purane system ki bhi history hai mere paas?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from legacy_spot_history where user_id=280

user.question: Mere legacy activation history mein kitni entries hain?
user.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from legacy_activation_history where user_id=280

user.question: Mera total SPOT income — legacy + new ledger — combined kitna hai approximately?
Why does my new ledger start only from 18 December 2025?
Legacy data aur new ledger mein se konsa data financial truth ke liye source-of-truth hai?
Total combined SPOT income ka calculation karke batao — legacy ka kitna, ledger ka kitna, total kitna?

admin.question: Platform-wide me legacy SPOT history rows kitni hain aur unka total amount kya hai?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text || '|' || coalesce(sum((data->>'income_amount')::numeric),0)::text from legacy_spot_history where nullif(data->>'income_amount','') is not null

admin.question: How many distinct users have any legacy SPOT history rows in our system?
How many distinct users have legacy activation history rows?
User SIA00299 ka legacy SPOT total kitna hai aur ledger SPOT kitna hai?
Top legacy SPOT earner kaun hai aur kitna amount hai unka?
User SIA00386 ki legacy SPOT vs ledger SPOT compare karke mismatch ka size batao.
User SIA00870 ka kya legacy SPOT history hai but new ledger SPOT zero hai? Verify and explain.
What is the migration cut-off date in our system and how does that affect the new ledger?
User SIA00299 ke legacy SPOT history me kitni rows imported hain?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select count(*)::text from legacy_spot_history where user_id=280

admin.question: Briefly explain what legacy_spot_history and legacy_activation_history tables are used for, and whether they are part of active financial computation.
User SIA00299 ka legacy SPOT income by level batao — Direct vs Level 1 vs others.
User SIA00299 ka purchase id 1540 (₹7500 package) ka 2x income tracker vs ledger entries explain karo aur legacy context bhi do.
Bataiye step-by-step ki agar user complain kare ki uska balance galat hai, toh legacy + ledger ka use karke kaise investigate karenge?
User SIA00558 ke legacy SPOT total + ledger SPOT total batao.
User SIA00299 says 'I did not get level-1 SPOT commission' — admin POV se diagnose karke explain karo, aur legacy context bhi do.
What is the total amount of legacy SPOT income imported into the system across all users?
admin.ground_truth_sql: select coalesce(sum((data->>'income_amount')::numeric),0)::text from legacy_spot_history where nullif(data->>'income_amount','') is not null

admin.question: User SIA00299 ka combined (legacy + ledger) SPOT total kitna hota hai?
Migration approach state-based tha ya full ledger migration tha? Explain in 2-3 sentences.
